narrative:
Clay 1 (Genoa) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 789 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
